topPicks.whyGood: American V8 icon — raw fun at a bargain price. low 51,000-mile example.
topPicks.whatToVerify: Inspect for frame rust or rot underneath. Check convertible top condition and motor. Compression test on V8 before purchase.
topPicks.bottomLine: Best V8 bang-for-buck in the search. At $9,426 this is silly cheap for a C4 Corvette — just budget for any deferred maintenance. Pure American muscle fun.

topPicks.whyGood: American V8 icon — raw fun at a bargain price. low 53,000-mile example.
topPicks.whatToVerify: Inspect for frame rust or rot underneath. Check convertible top condition and motor. Compression test on V8 before purchase.
topPicks.bottomLine: Best V8 bang-for-buck in the search. At $10,900 this is silly cheap for a C4 Corvette — just budget for any deferred maintenance. Pure American muscle fun.

topPicks.whyGood: V8 Mustang convertible — the classic summer car. only 55,000 miles.
topPicks.whatToVerify: Inspect for frame rails rust (older cars). Verify convertible top seals well. Check for mods or track use.
topPicks.bottomLine: A real Mustang GT convertible with low miles for this price is rare. This is the one to go see first.

topPicks.whyGood: Mid-engine Porsche — handles like nothing else at this price. 986-gen sweet spot for value. flagged as a Good Deal by pricing algorithms.
topPicks.whatToVerify: IMS bearing service history (critical on 986 pre-2000). Any coolant leak history. Convertible top motor and seals.
topPicks.bottomLine: The Boxster punches way above its price. If the IMS bearing is good, this is the most driver's car in the list.

topPicks.whyGood: E85 Z4 — sharp chassis with BMW inline-six. Hardtop or soft-top, great to drive.
topPicks.whatToVerify: Check for rust in wheel wells and sills. Convertible top condition. Cooling system service history.
topPicks.bottomLine: The E85 Z4 is sharper than the Z3 with more power. Strong value at this price.

topPicks.whyGood: B6/B7 Audi A4 cabriolet — sophisticated and underrated. remarkably low 45,587 miles. flagged as a Good Deal by pricing algorithms.
topPicks.whatToVerify: Timing chain/belt service history. Check for any oil leaks. Quattro drivetrain condition.
topPicks.bottomLine: Only 45,587 miles on a B6 Audi A4 cab is exceptional. Sophisticated and underrated.

topPicks.whatToVerify: Inspect convertible top and seals. Check for any prior accidents on Carfax. Test all electronics.
topPicks.bottomLine: Mustang convertible at $10,500 — classic summer car. V6 moves well enough for fun.

topPicks.whyGood: BMW convertible — four-season capable with the top down. reasonable mileage at 80,232.
topPicks.whatToVerify: Cooling system (water pump, thermostat) service. Check for oil leaks from valve cover. Convertible top hydraulics.
topPicks.bottomLine: Solid value pick at $10,900. Get a pre-purchase inspection and you'll know fast.

topPicks.whyGood: Classic BMW roadster — pure, simple, rear-wheel fun. Timeless E36-era mechanicals, easy to maintain.
topPicks.whatToVerify: Check for rust in wheel wells and sills. Convertible top condition. Cooling system service history.
topPicks.bottomLine: The E36 Z3 is aging beautifully. Simple, honest, rear-wheel fun — easy to fix and cheap to run.

topPicks.whyGood: MINI Convertible — city-fun car with go-kart handling.
topPicks.whatToVerify: Timing chain service (N12/N16 engines prone to stretch). Check for coolant in oil. Convertible top seals and latches.
topPicks.bottomLine: The MINI is the most fun per dollar for daily city driving. Just watch the timing chain.

mustangPicks.whyGood: V8 Mustang convertible — the classic summer car. only 55,000 miles.
mustangPicks.whatToVerify: Inspect for frame rails rust (older cars). Verify convertible top seals well. Check for mods or track use.
mustangPicks.bottomLine: A real Mustang GT convertible with low miles for this price is rare. This is the one to go see first.

mustangPicks.whyGood: Mustang convertible — head-turning fun. 78,880 miles. flagged as a Great Deal by CarGurus/AutoTrader.
mustangPicks.whatToVerify: Inspect convertible top and seals. Check for any prior accidents on Carfax. Test all electronics.
mustangPicks.bottomLine: Mustang convertible at $14,598 — classic summer car. V6 moves well enough for fun.

mustangPicks.whatToVerify: Inspect convertible top and seals. Check for any prior accidents on Carfax. Test all electronics.
mustangPicks.bottomLine: Mustang convertible at $10,500 — classic summer car. V6 moves well enough for fun.

mustangPicks.whatToVerify: Inspect convertible top and seals. Check for any prior accidents on Carfax. Test all electronics.
mustangPicks.bottomLine: Mustang convertible at $11,459 — classic summer car. V6 moves well enough for fun.
